criteria_version: search/inclusion_criteria.md §1 (Stage-1 title-abstract screen) — priority batch 7, ranks 600-699

decisions.reason: Frontiers in Psychology 2022 randomized survey on risk perception × political orientation × COVID-19 behavior; political-behavior outcome, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Frontiers in Psychology 2021 mood-induction × subjective-report (basic methodology); not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
Social Psychology Quarterly 2019 experimental test of similarity-liking and repulsion hypotheses; eligible (experimental, liking principle, interpersonal-attraction outcome).
J Social Personal Relationships 2019 laboratory study on similarity-liking link with bogus-similarity manipulation; eligible.
Frontiers in Psychology 2019 N=232 longitudinal study on gain-framed messaging × efficacy info × sport behavior; eligible.
Frontiers in Psychology 2018 ERP study on Cyberball ball-reception probabilities; basic neuroscience, false positive on 'lowball'; fails §2.1.

J Pacific Rim Psychology 2018 study on regulatory fit × advice-taking for vocational decisions; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, decision outcome — career-decision context is commercial-decision-analog).
American Journal of Psychology 2017 three experiments on social-appraisal similarity × liking; eligible (experimental, liking principle, interpersonal outcome).
Int J Social Research Methodology 2017 method comparison study of focus groups vs interviews; methodological, not persuasion-intervention; fails §2.2.
BMC Psychology 2016 sport-psychology RCT for athletic performance; sport context, no commercial mechanism; fails §2.1.
Applied Psychology 2016 two vignette-experiment studies on regulatory fit × serial-entrepreneurship intentions; eligible (entrepreneurial decision context is commercial-decision).
J Psychosocial Nursing Mental Health 2016 PMID on autovideography for severe mental illness; clinical, no commercial mechanism; fails §2.1.
Scandinavian J Psychology 2015 on context-specific cues for dental-visit recall; false positive on 'authority'; fails §2.1.
Mediterranean J Social Sciences 2015 on training-needs-analysis at Malaysian manufacturing companies; false positive on 'tna'; fails §2.1.
Social Psychology 2014 replication of psychological distance × moral judgment; not commercial context; need full text per §2.1.
J Applied Sport Psychology 2014 online cross-sectional randomized study on gain-framed sport-messages × possible sport selves; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior-intent outcome).
Frontiers in Psychology 2014 review of Iowa Gambling Task; not commercial decision; need full text per §2.1.
J Positive Psychology 2014 RE-AIM review of positive-psychology interventions; false positive on 'puppy-dog'; fails §2.1.
J Applied Soc Psych 2014 on regulatory fit × dyadic team performance in table football; sport-team context not commercial; fails §2.1.
Management Science 2014 turnaround-game experiment on leadership × communication × coordination; organizational not consumer; need full text per §2.1.

Counselling and Psychotherapy Research 2012 experimental study on reflective listening + open-ended questions in counseling; eligible (calibrated-question/MI mechanisms; counseling parallel to sales-discovery).
Translational Psychiatry 2012 RCT of bumetanide for autism; pharmacological clinical trial; fails §2.1.
BMC Psychiatry 2012 neurofeedback RCT for ADHD; clinical, false positive on 'puppy-dog'; fails §2.1.
J Clinical Psychiatry 2012 on placebo response in schizophrenia trials; false positive on 'trial-close'; fails §2.1.
Psychology and Health 2011 12-month RCT on gain-framed targeted messages × calcium intake in young women; eligible.
Social Psych Personality Science 2010 on bivariate attitude similarity × interpersonal liking; eligible (experimental, liking principle).
Behavioural and Cognitive Psychotherapy 2010 ACT verbal repetition for contamination-thought reduction; clinical CBT, false positive on 'mirroring'; fails §2.1.
Psychological Medicine 2010 on facial-expression misattribution in psychosis-risk adolescents; clinical, fails §2.1.
J General Psychology 2010 on regulatory fit × inattentional blindness; basic attentional research, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
J Management 2010 on coach regulatory focus × individual performance; coaching/leadership context, need full text per §2.1.
Educational and Psychological Measurement 2009 on feedback-and-revise for open-ended educational questions; educational-measurement context, false positive on 'calibrated-question'; fails §2.1.
J Educational Psychology 2009 on shared-book-reading questions for word learning in 3-year-olds; educational, false positive on 'calibrated-question'; fails §2.1.
Developmental Psychology 2009 on facial-emotion recognition in terrorism-exposed children; basic developmental psychology; fails §2.1.
J Clinical Sport Psychology 2009 on MSPE for long-distance runners; sport intervention, fails §2.1.
J Business Economics Management 2007 on organizational commitment × culture in Indian automobile industry; workplace organizational context, need full text per §2.1.
British J Management 2005 on public-sector performance turnaround; false positive on 'sharp-angle'; fails §2.1.
J Educational Psychology 2001 interactive book reading for preschool; educational, false positive on 'calibrated-question'; fails §2.1.
J Consulting Clinical Psychology 1994 on social-cognitive processes in aggressive boys; false positive on 'labeling'; fails §2.1.
J Economic Psychology 1994 experiment on unavailability × product evaluation; eligible (experimental, scarcity, consumer-evaluation outcome).
British J Psychology 1965 on repetition in verbal learning; basic memory research, false positive on 'mirroring'; fails §2.1.
arXiv 2026 fixed-budget benchmark for medical event models; ML/AI false positive on 'anchor-with-range'; fails §2.1.
Japanese Economic Review 2021 study on repeated nudge-based COVID messages × behavior over time; eligible (experimental, framing nudges, behavior outcome).
Clinics in Shoulder and Elbow 2020 on Bankart repair cyst formation; orthopedic surgery, false positive on 'anchor-with-range'; fails §2.1.
Oxford Scholarship Online 2018 on responsibility-to-protect international ethics; false positive on 'isolate-and-conquer'; fails §2.1.

J Public Economics 2017 natural field experiments on tax-collection compliance using behavioral interventions; eligible (field experiments, behavioral persuasion, compliance outcome — tax compliance is commercial-decision-adjacent).
Annals of Behavioral Medicine 2013 cluster-RCT on gain/loss framing × oral health in Iranian adolescents; eligible.
Annals of Behavioral Medicine 2012 comparison study of HBM vs TPB for HPV uptake (incl framing); eligible (empirical theoretical comparison).
2012 textbook on Health Communication Message Design (theory + practice including gain/loss framing); eligible (synthesis of empirical literature).
2009 study on authority vs peer cues × web user decisions; eligible (experimental, authority + social-proof, decision outcome).
arXiv 2026 N=3514 experimental study on AI vs human debt-collection mediation × consumer reciprocity/trust/fairness; eligible (experimental, persuasion in commercial debt-context, behavior outcome).
ClinicalTrials.gov 2026 4-arm RCT on nostalgia messages + step-monitoring for older-adult walking; eligible (RCT, persuasion technique, behavior outcome).
Aalto University 2026 thesis on AI vs human recommendations × brand reputation; eligible (consumer-brand context, authority-source comparison, brand-evaluation outcome).
arXiv 2026 on simulated phishing-campaign behavioral data analysis; persuasion-context but security-research framing; need full text to judge §2.1.
Edinburgh Napier thesis 2026 exploring Scottish food/drink SME sales-process; qualitative-thesis approach unclear from abstract; need full text per §2.5.
arXiv 2025 on multi-turn LLM jailbreaks using FITD principle; LLM safety/red-teaming not human persuasion compliance; fails §2.1.
arXiv 2025 on observing AI in the street (publics perspective); false positive on 'reciprocity'; not human-decision compliance; fails §2.1.
arXiv 2025 quasi-experiment on police-donor reciprocity bias in Chicago stops; reciprocity mechanism but officer-discretion outcome, not commercial; need full text per §2.1.
arXiv 2025 on computational modeling of strategic coopetition; theoretical formal modeling, not empirical compliance; fails §2.1.

arXiv 2025 Wizard-of-Oz controlled experiment on emotion in customer service interactions; customer-service context could be eligible but method/outcome unclear from abstract; need full text per §2.4.
arXiv 2025 study on cognitive biases × LLM-driven product recommendations; eligible (commercial recommendation context, persuasion mechanism, consumer-decision outcome).
arXiv 2025 on LLM unlearning agents; false positive on 'tna'; fails §2.1.
2025 study on phishing-intervention effectiveness in university hospital; security-intervention context, not commercial-decision; need full text per §2.1.
Behaviour and Information Technology 2025 on AI acceptance × freedom-to-choose × social-proof × UK/Arab cultural differences; eligible (experimental, social-proof, AI-acceptance attitude outcome).
OSF 2025 between-subjects on healthcare-shooting perception × framing × reciprocity-norms; political/violence-perception, not commercial-decision; fails §2.1.
OSF 2025 second study on social-proof dark patterns in online coach booking; eligible (preregistered experiment, social-proof, commercial-booking outcome).
arXiv 2024 on FITD attack on LLM ReAct agents; LLM safety attack research, not human compliance; fails §2.1.
arXiv 2024 on incivility/rigidity in fine-tuned LLMs for political argumentation; AI political-discourse research, fails §2.1.
arXiv 2024 on regulatory fit × persuasive messages for smart-home privacy-tool adoption; eligible (experimental, regulatory fit, technology-adoption decision).
Finance & Economics 2024 on factors influencing consumer preferences for online takeaway ordering; eligible (commercial consumer context).
Science Communication 2024 2×2 between-subjects on VR vs video × gain/loss framing for climate communication; climate-communication context, need full text per §2.1.
J Aging & Social Policy 2024 study on cognitive reflection × social proof × tax incentives for retirement savings; eligible (commercial-financial-decision context, social-proof, savings outcome).
OSF 2024 on second-order beliefs × reciprocity in climate-financing willingness; climate-cooperation context, need full text per §2.1.
arXiv 2023 on GPT-3.5 operationalizing cooperative behavior in economic games; LLM-as-subject in dilemma games, not human commercial decision; fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2023 RCT on self-fitting strategies for Lexie hearing aids; consumer-medical-device context, need full text to check fitness for §2.4 outcomes.
Meat Science 2023 N-quota-sample online experimental survey on loss-framing × meat-consumption reduction in Italy; eligible (experimental, framing, behavior intent outcome).
OSF 2023 on affect-labeling × children's emotion regulation; basic developmental emotion research, false positive on 'labeling'; fails §2.1.
Management 2022 on loss-aversion + framing nudge for student classroom performance; academic-context, need full text per §2.1.
Information Technology and People 2022 on consumers' purchase intentions in social commerce × psychological distance × cognitive effort; eligible.
Surgical Endoscopy 2022 on lymphadenectomy × chemotherapy compliance in gastric cancer; clinical surgical study, false positive on 'reciprocity'; fails §2.1.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2021 RCT on persuasive-appeal effectiveness (deontological, empathy, reciprocity, etc.) × COVID prevention intentions; eligible.
Review of Economics and Political Science 2021 on voice + empathy × tax compliance; tax-compliance not commercial-decision; need full text per §2.1.
BMC Public Health 2021 co-design of digital dietary intervention for T2D adults; intervention-design study, need full text to check for empirical persuasion-mechanism component.
IEEE Transactions Image Processing 2021 on multi-view subspace clustering; ML, false positive on 'extreme-anchor'; fails §2.1.
J Consumer Marketing 2021 on regulatory fit × consumer forgive-vs-retaliate × repurchase decisions after product failure; eligible.
J Services Marketing 2021 on regulatory fit between service relationships and appeals in co-production; eligible.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2020 RCT on multiple behavioral-science strategies (incl FITD) for flu vaccination at retail pharmacy; eligible.
Risk Analysis 2020 N=439 two-way experiment on narrative format × gain/loss framing × e-cigarette prevention; eligible.
Canadian J Behavioural Science 2020 field experiment on nudging × hand-hygiene during COVID; eligible (field experiment, framing nudge, behavior outcome).
NBER 2020 large-scale field experiment on loss-framed performance incentives at 294 car dealerships; eligible (field experiment in directly commercial-sales context — DIRECTLY on-thesis).
AEA RCT Registry 2020 — same study as i=688 (NBER preregistration); flag at dedup-extraction.
ClinicalTrials.gov 2019 pilot RCT on zero-time exercise for depression; clinical, false positive on 'fitd'; fails §2.1.
MedienJournal 2019 German systematic review of 167 articles / 203 studies on framing effects in health communication; eligible (review of empirical framing literature).
UNC dissertation 2019 on customized-recommendation source × product type × choice amount × consumer attitudes; eligible (dissertation per §4.8, commercial context, authority + choice mechanisms).
J Travel Research 2019 on traveler psychological distance × language abstraction × message-appeal type in social-media ads; eligible (experimental, construal × framing, ad-effectiveness outcome).
J Product & Brand Management 2019 on envy × brand storytelling × psychological distance for brand preference; eligible.
2019 preliminary study on social proof + legitimization-of-paltry-contributions for OSS donations; eligible (experimental, two persuasion mechanisms, donation outcome).
J Association Information Systems 2018 eye-tracking study on Taobao live-show × gender × shopping intention; eligible (experimental, attention/persuasion cues, shopping-intent outcome).
Environment and Behavior 2018 on trait affect × state emotion × sustainable-consumption social dilemma; dilemma-game outcome, need full text per §2.1.
Archives of Disease in Childhood 2018 case report on brincidofovir for pediatric adenovirus; clinical case report, false positive on 'trial-close'; fails §2.1/§4.5.
Delft TU 2017 stated-choice experiment on consumer preferences for Mobility-as-a-Service subscription packages; eligible (commercial-subscription decision context, consumer-preference outcome).
